testcase.name: test_create_platform_admin_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:227: in test_create_platform_admin_user assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"Failed to create platform admin: {r.status_code} - {r.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create platform admin: 400 - {"detail":"Email already registered"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_created_platform_admin_in_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Created user not in list. testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:239: in test_created_platform_admin_in_list assert self.TEST_EMAIL in emails, f"Created user not in list. Found: ['test_platform-admin-iter164@test.local'] E assert 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' in ['test_platform-admin-iter164@test.local'] E + where 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' = <test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.TestPlatformAdminCreation object at 0xfb75fe1b0810>.TEST_EMAIL

failure.message: AssertionError: User not found assert None is not None
